hooks.description: Universal pre-tool guardrail. Blocks destructive invocations such as --no-verify, force-push-to-main, and wildcard home deletion. Opt out per-session with AGENT_FORGE_GUARDIAN=off.
hooks.name: pre-tool-execution-guardian

hooks.description: Import new Gemini sidecar notes back into canonical MEMORY.md at session end.
hooks.name: memory-bridge-inbound-gemini

hooks.description: Bridge canonical MEMORY.md into a Gemini project-local memory sidecar at session start.
hooks.name: memory-bridge-outbound-gemini

forge-factory.description: Local Agent Forge factory MCP server.
